profile.name: Aggressive
profile.description: Growth focus. Heavy equity weighting maximises long-term expected return but expect periodic 20%+ drawdowns. Suitable if you have a long time horizon and won't panic-sell during downturns.

rebalance_events.rationale_text: Q1 2024 rebalance — Aggressive profile. Target allocation: 65% US stocks, 10% long-term Treasuries (TLT), 15% S&P 500 (SPY), 5% gold (GLD), 5% international stocks (EFA). Equity sleeve (65% of portfolio) spread across AAPL, MSFT, NVDA; base equal-weight before AI tilt. AI tilt within equity sleeve (rankings are relative — the sleeve total stays at the profile target): overweight NVDA (+5.0%, ML score=+0.0319, highest score in sleeve); underweight AAPL (-4.1%, ML score=+0.0094, lowest score in sleeve); underweight MSFT (-1.5%, ML score=+0.0144, mid score).

AI tilt within equity sleeve (rankings are relative — the sleeve total stays at the profile target): underweight NVDA (-5.0%, ML score=-0.0234, lowest score in sleeve); overweight AAPL (+4.5%, ML score=+0.0144, highest score in sleeve); overweight MSFT (+1.1%, ML score=+0.0032, mid score).
